hooks.prompt:
You are working in the ABCA (Autonomous Background Coding Agents on AWS) repository — a self-hosted platform for background coding agents.

Key directories: cdk/src/ (CDK infra), agent/src/ (Python agent), cli/src/ (bgagent CLI), docs/ (documentation).

Essential commands (require MISE_EXPERIMENTAL=1): mise run install, mise run build, mise //cdk:compile, mise //cdk:test, mise //cdk:deploy.

Critical: types in cdk/src/handlers/shared/types.ts must stay in sync with cli/src/types.ts. Don't edit docs/src/content/docs/ directly — it's generated.

Task types: new_task (create PR), pr_iteration (update PR), pr_review (review PR).

Available plugin skills: /setup, /deploy, /onboard-repo, /submit-task, /troubleshoot, /abca-status, /abca-submit
Available agents: cdk-expert, agent-debugger

Docs: https://aws-samples.github.io/sample-autonomous-cloud-coding-agents/
